revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:May 23 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of May 23 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: robot Adding: [[zh:五月廿三]], [[zh-yue:五月廿三]]
/* できごと */ [[5月23日]]から移動
/* 記念日・年中行事 */ 忌日節で
/* できごと */ 飛騨県も同日
[[User:Addbot|ボット]]: 言語間リンク 3 件を[[Wikipedia:ウィキデータ|ウィキデータ]]上の [[d:q839558]] に転記
1 revision imported: importing jawiki history before translation, of all the 12 lunar months
Copying from [[Category:旧暦5月]] to [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{旧暦5月}} '''旧暦5月23日'''は、[[5月 (旧暦)|旧暦5月]]の23日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]]である。
== できごと == * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[7月12日]]） - [[兵庫県]]・[[飛騨県]]が設置される。
== 誕生日 == * [[天保]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1832年]][[6月21日]]） - [[寺島宗則]]、外交官（+ [[1893年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[弘仁]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[811年]][[6月17日]]） - [[坂上田村麻呂]]、[[征夷大将軍]]（* [[758年]]） <!--* [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月28日]]） - [[大友義鎮]]（宗麟）、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1530年]]）--「[[大友義鎮]]」には「5月6日」と記載--> * [[寛永]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1634年]][[6月18日]]） - [[豪姫]]（樹正院）、[[前田利家]]の四女・[[豊臣秀吉]]の養女（* [[1574年]]） * [[寛文]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1672年]][[6月18日]]） - [[石川丈山]]、[[文人]]（* [[1583年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|5|22|5|24|4|23|6|5|0523}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:5月23日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

== 忌日 == * [[弘仁]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[811年]][[6月17日]]） - [[坂上田村麻呂]]、[[征夷大将軍]]（* [[758年]]） <!--* [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月28日]]） - [[大友義鎮]]（宗麟）、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1530年]]）--「[[大友義鎮]]」には「5月6日」と記載--> * [[寛永]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1634年]][[6月18日]]） - [[豪姫]]（樹正院）、[[前田利家]]の四女・[[豊臣秀吉]]の養女（* [[1574年]]） * [[寛文]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1672年]][[6月18日]]） - [[石川丈山]]、[[文人]]（* [[1583年]]）

<!--== {{Lunar May}} ''May 23'''<!--Lunar May23 is the Nth day of 、[[5月 (旧暦)|Lunar May]]の23日目である。六曜は[[六曜#先負|先負]][[Category:先負]]である。
--> == Events == * [[明治]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1868年]][[7月12日]]） - [[兵庫県]]・[[飛騨県]]が設置される。
== Births == * [[天保]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1832年]][[6月21日]]） - [[寺島宗則]]、外交官（+ [[1893年]]）
== Deaths == * [[弘仁]]2年（[[ユリウス暦]][[811年]][[6月17日]]） - [[坂上田村麻呂]]、[[征夷大将軍]]（* [[758年]]） <!--* [[天正]]15年（グレゴリオ暦[[1587年]][[6月28日]]） - [[大友義鎮]]（宗麟）、[[キリシタン大名]]（* [[1530年]]）--「[[大友義鎮]]」には「5月6日」と記載--> * [[寛永]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1634年]][[6月18日]]） - [[豪姫]]（樹正院）、[[前田利家]]の四女・[[豊臣秀吉]]の養女（* [[1574年]]） * [[寛文]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1672年]][[6月18日]]） - [[石川丈山]]、[[文人]]（* [[1583年]]）
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:May 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 5월 23일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿三]] [[zh:五月廿三]] [[en:draft:May 23 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar May}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|May (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}}.
== Events == * [[明治]]1st year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1868]][[7月12日]]） - [[兵庫県]]・[[飛騨県]]が設置される。
== Births == * [[天保]]3年（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1832]][[6月21日]]） - [[寺島宗則]]、外交官（+ [[1893]]）
== Deaths == * [[弘仁]]2年（[[Julian Calendar]][[811]][[6月17日]]） - [[坂上田村麻呂]]、[[征夷大将軍]]（* [[758]]） <「[[大友義鎮]]」には「5月6日」と記載--> * [[寛永]]11年（グレゴリオ暦[[1634]][[6月18日]]） - [[豪姫]]（樹正院）、[[前田利家]]の四女・[[豊臣秀吉]]の養女（* [[1574]]） * [[寛文]]12年（グレゴリオ暦[[1672]][[6月18日]]） - [[石川丈山]]、[[文人]]（* [[1583]]）
== Commemorations ==

revision.text:
[[sn:May 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 23일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿三]] [[zh:五月廿三]] [[en:draft:May 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 12]] ） - [[兵庫県]] ・[[飛騨県]] が設置される。
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[June 21]] ） - [[寺島宗則]] 、外交官（+ [[1893]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘仁]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[811]] [[June 17]] ） - [[坂上田村麻呂]] 、[[征夷大将軍]] （* [[758]] ） <「[[大友義鎮]] 」には「5月6日」と記載--> * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1634]] [[June 18]] ） - [[豪姫]] （樹正院）、[[前田利家]] の四女・[[豊臣秀吉]] の養女（* [[1574]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1672]] [[June 18]] ） - [[石川丈山]] 、[[文人]] （* [[1583]] ）
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|22|5|24|4|23|6|5|0523}}

== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 12]] ） - [[兵庫県]] ・[[飛騨県]] が設置される。

== Deaths == * [[弘仁]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[811]] [[June 17]] ） - [[坂上田村麻呂]] 、[[Shogun]] （* [[758]] ） <「[[Otomo Yoshinobu]] 」には「5月6日」と記載--> * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1634]] [[June 18]] ） - [[豪姫]] （樹正院）、[[Maeda Toshiie]] の四女・[[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の養女（* [[1574]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1672]] [[June 18]] ） - [[石川丈山]] 、[[文人]] （* [[1583]] ）

[[sn:May 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 23일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿三]] [[zh:五月廿三]] [[en:draft:May 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar May}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 12]] ） - [[兵庫県]] ・[[飛騨県]] が設置される。
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[June 21]] ） - [[寺島宗則]] 、外交官（+ [[1893]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘仁]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[811]] [[June 17]] ） - [[坂上田村麻呂]] 、[[Shogun]] （* [[758]] ） <「[[Otomo Yoshinobu]] 」には「5月6日」と記載--> * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1634]] [[June 18]] ） - [[豪姫]] （樹正院）、[[Maeda Toshiie]] の四女・[[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の養女（* [[1574]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1672]] [[June 18]] ） - [[石川丈山]] 、[[文人]] （* [[1583]] ）

== Deaths == * [[弘仁]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[811]] [[June 17]] ） - [[坂上田村麻呂]] 、[[Shogun]] （* [[758]] ） <「[[Otomo Yoshinobu]] 」には「5月6日」と記載--> * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1634]] [[June 18]] ） - [[豪姫]] （樹正院）、[[Maeda Toshiie]] の四女・[[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の養女（* [[1574]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1672]] [[June 18]] ） - [[石川丈山]] 、[[文人]] （* [[1583]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:May 23 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 5월 23일]] [[cdo:5 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:5月23日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 5월 23일]] [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿三]] [[zh:五月廿三]] [[en:draft:May 23 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar May}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May}} the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負}} .
== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 12]] ） - [[兵庫県]] ・[[飛騨県]] が設置される。
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[June 21]] ） - [[寺島宗則]] 、外交官（+ [[1893]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘仁]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[811]] [[June 17]] ） - [[坂上田村麻呂]] 、[[Shogun]] （* [[758]] ） <「[[Otomo Yoshinobu]] 」には「5月6日」と記載--> * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1634]] [[June 18]] ） - [[豪姫]] （樹正院）、[[Maeda Toshiie]] の四女・[[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の養女（* [[1574]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1672]] [[June 18]] ） - [[石川丈山]] 、[[文人]] （* [[1583]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|22|5|24|4|23|6|5|0523}}

== Events == * [[Meiji era|Meiji]] 1st year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1868]] [[July 12]] ） - [[兵庫県]] ・[[飛騨県]] が設置される。
== Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 3rd year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1832]] [[June 21]] ） - [[寺島宗則]] 、外交官（+ [[1893]] ）
== Deaths == * [[弘仁]] 2nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[811]] [[June 17]] ） - [[坂上田村麻呂]] 、[[Shogun]] （* [[758]] ） <「[[Otomo Yoshinobu]] 」には「5月6日」と記載--> * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft}} 11th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1634]] [[June 18]] ） - [[豪姫]] （樹正院）、[[Maeda Toshiie]] の四女・[[Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] の養女（* [[1574]] ） * {{ill|Kanbun|ja|寛文|12=draft}} 12nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1672]] [[June 18]] ） - [[石川丈山]] 、[[文人]] （* [[1583]] ）
== Commemorations == == See Also ==

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|May 23|qq=May 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 12|July 12]]) – The prefectures of Hyōgo and Hida were established. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat, was born (died [[:en:1893|1893]]). == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat (died [[:en:1893|1893]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:811|811]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakagami Tamuramaro]], a shōgun (born [[:en:758|758]]) <Note: Another source, "Otomo Yoshinobu," lists May 6.>
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Gōhime|Gōhime]] (Jumyo-in), the adopted daughter of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1574|1574]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1672|1672]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Ishikawa Jōzan|Ishikawa Jōzan]], a literati (born [[:en:1583|1583]]).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 12|July 12]]) – The prefectures of Hyōgo and Hida were established. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat, was born (died [[:en:1893|1893]]). == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat (died [[:en:1893|1893]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:811|811]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakagami Tamuramaro]], a shōgun (born [[:en:758|758]]) <Note: Another source, "Otomo Yoshinobu," lists May 6.>
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Gōhime|Gōhime]] (Jumyo-in), the adopted daughter of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1574|1574]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1672|1672]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Ishikawa Jōzan|Ishikawa Jōzan]], a literati (born [[:en:1583|1583]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 12|July 12]]) – The prefectures of Hyōgo and Hida were established. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat, was born (died [[:en:1893|1893]]). == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat (died [[:en:1893|1893]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:811|811]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakagami Tamuramaro]], a shōgun (born [[:en:758|758]]) <Note: Another source, "Otomo Yoshinobu," lists May 6.>
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Gōhime|Gōhime]] (Jumyo-in), the adopted daughter of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1574|1574]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1672|1672]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Ishikawa Jōzan|Ishikawa Jōzan]], a literati (born [[:en:1583|1583]]).

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 12|July 12]]) – The prefectures of Hyōgo and Hida were established. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat, was born (died [[:en:1893|1893]]). == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat (died [[:en:1893|1893]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:811|811]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakagami Tamuramaro]], a shōgun (born [[:en:758|758]]) <Note: Another source, "Otomo Yoshinobu," lists May 6.>
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Gōhime|Gōhime]] (Jumyo-in), the adopted daughter of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1574|1574]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1672|1672]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Ishikawa Jōzan|Ishikawa Jōzan]], a literati (born [[:en:1583|1583]]).

[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:五月廿三]] {{wikidata link|Q839558}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿三]][[zh:五月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839558]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 23|qq=May 23}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 12|July 12]]) – The prefectures of Hyōgo and Hida were established. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat, was born (died [[:en:1893|1893]]). == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat (died [[:en:1893|1893]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:811|811]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakagami Tamuramaro]], a shōgun (born [[:en:758|758]]) <Note: Another source, "Otomo Yoshinobu," lists May 6.>
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Gōhime|Gōhime]] (Jumyo-in), the adopted daughter of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1574|1574]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1672|1672]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Ishikawa Jōzan|Ishikawa Jōzan]], a literati (born [[:en:1583|1583]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|22|5|24|4|23|6|5|0523|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 12|July 12]]) – The prefectures of Hyōgo and Hida were established. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat, was born (died [[:en:1893|1893]]). == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat (died [[:en:1893|1893]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:811|811]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakagami Tamuramaro]], a shōgun (born [[:en:758|758]]) <Note: Another source, "Otomo Yoshinobu," lists May 6.>
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Gōhime|Gōhime]] (Jumyo-in), the adopted daughter of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1574|1574]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1672|1672]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Ishikawa Jōzan|Ishikawa Jōzan]], a literati (born [[:en:1583|1583]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿三]][[zh:五月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:五月廿三]][[zh:五月廿三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:5 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:5月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 5월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:5 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:五月廿三]][[zh:五月廿三]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q839558]] Wikidata name: 23rd day of the 5th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:06, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|May 23|qq=May 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:July 12|July 12]]) – The prefectures of Hyōgo and Hida were established. * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat, was born (died [[:en:1893|1893]]). == Births == * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1832|1832]] [[:en:June 21|June 21]]) – [[:en:Terashima Munenori|Terashima Munenori]], a diplomat (died [[:en:1893|1893]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:弘仁|弘仁]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:811|811]] [[:en:June 17|June 17]]) – [[:en:Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|Sakagami Tamuramaro]], a shōgun (born [[:en:758|758]]) <Note: Another source, "Otomo Yoshinobu," lists May 6.>
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 11th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1634|1634]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Gōhime|Gōhime]] (Jumyo-in), the adopted daughter of Oda Nobunaga (born [[:en:1574|1574]]). * [[:en:Kanbun (era)|Kanbun]] 12nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1672|1672]] [[:en:June 18|June 18]]) – [[:en:Ishikawa Jōzan|Ishikawa Jōzan]], a literati (born [[:en:1583|1583]]).
== Commemorations == == See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|5|22|5|24|4|23|6|5|0523|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|May 23|qq=May 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=五月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 5월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar May|qq=}} '''May 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|May (Lunisolar)|ja|5月 (旧暦)|lt=May (Satsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/May (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 5th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|WD=Q96759842}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|July 12|en|July 12|WD=Q2688|lt=July 12}}) – The prefectures of Hyōgo and Hida were established. * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1832|en|1832|WD=Q7584|lt=1832}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – {{ill|Terashima Munenori|en|Terashima Munenori|WD=Q249025|lt=Terashima Munenori}}, a diplomat, was born (died {{ill|1893|en|1893|WD=Q7840|lt=1893}}). == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1832|en|1832|WD=Q7584|lt=1832}} {{ill|June 21|en|June 21|WD=Q2671|lt=June 21}}) – {{ill|Terashima Munenori|en|Terashima Munenori|WD=Q249025|lt=Terashima Munenori}}, a diplomat (died {{ill|1893|en|1893|WD=Q7840|lt=1893}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|弘仁|en|弘仁|WD=Q117599407|lt=弘仁}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|811|en|811|WD=Q29946|lt=811}} {{ill|June 17|en|June 17|WD=Q2672|lt=June 17}}) – {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|WD=Q941979|lt=Sakagami Tamuramaro}}, a shōgun (born {{ill|758|en|758|WD=Q30538|lt=758}}) <Note: Another source, "Otomo Yoshinobu," lists May 6.>
* {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 11th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1634|en|1634|WD=Q6872|lt=1634}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) – {{ill|Gōhime|en|Gōhime|WD=Q10855371|lt=Gōhime}} (Jumyo-in), the adopted daughter of Oda Nobunaga (born {{ill|1574|en|1574|WD=Q6680|lt=1574}}). * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|WD=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1672|en|1672|WD=Q7614|lt=1672}} {{ill|June 18|en|June 18|WD=Q2670|lt=June 18}}) – {{ill|Ishikawa Jōzan|en|Ishikawa Jōzan|WD=Q11585666|lt=Ishikawa Jōzan}}, a literati (born {{ill|1583|en|1583|WD=Q6726|lt=1583}}).
